name: Creamy Corn Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch frying pan, sauté the shallots in the clarified butter until tender.
2. Add corn and poblano chilies. Cook for a minute or two.
3. Stir in the white wine. Bring to a boil and reduce by one-third.
4. Stir in the heavy cream and bring to a simmer again.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Puree 2/3 of the sauce, then stir back into the remainder.
7. Serve warm with seafood dishes.
